items.title: Dr. Jitendra Singh inaugurates BioNEST at "Central Food Technology & Research Institute" (CFTRI) Mysuru, Focus on Food Startups
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Science & Technology Dr. Jitendra Singh inaugurates BioNEST at "Central Food Technology & Research Institute" (CFTRI) Mysuru, Focus on Food Startups CFTRI expands incubation reach with new MoUs, PPP-driven product launches and industry partnerships India's incubation ecosystem to be a key platform for bridging laboratory research with commercial applications M…
